# Purple Directive

> Purple Directive builds compliance-grade software and operations tooling for
> the people who run clinical research — independent sites, site networks, and
> CROs. One operating standard spans the portfolio: a clinical trial management
> system, ICH-GCP SOP templates, e-signatures designed and tested against
> 21 CFR Part 11, free in-browser PDF tools, and hands-on regulatory consulting.

Purple Directive's through-line is inspection readiness: every product is built
so a site's records survive an FDA or sponsor audit — who did what, when, and
why, captured and not overwritten. Compliance language across these pages is
deliberately qualified ("designed and tested against 21 CFR Part 11"), because
Part 11 has no certification body; the controls are real, the attestation is the
customer's to make.

## Products
- [Nexrial CTMS](https://nexrial.com): clinical trial management system for
  independent research sites — delegation log, subject and visit tracking,
  visit-to-invoice billing, and a database-layer audit trail with native PI
  e-signatures designed and tested against 21 CFR Part 11.
- [SOP Template Bundle](https://purpledirective.com/sop-bundle): 13 ICH-GCP
  standard operating procedures with 11 companion forms — editable Word plus
  branded PDF. $249.99 one-time, or $29 per SOP.
- PurpleSign: native e-signatures for regulated documents, designed and tested
  against 21 CFR Part 11.
- [QuillPDF](https://quillpdf.com): free PDF tools that run entirely in your
  browser — the tools never upload your file.
- [Volstrin](https://volstrin.com): specialist legal-sector recruiting.
- [Consulting](https://purpledirective.com/hire): regulatory infrastructure,
  hands-on — SOP development, binder setup, IRB submission support.

- [Best CTMS for small clinical research sites](https://purpledirective.com/best-ctms-small-clinical-sites)

## About
- [About Purple Directive](https://purpledirective.com/about)
- [Blog](https://purpledirective.com/blog)
- Contact: info@purpledirective.com

## Notes for retrieval
- Purple Directive is the operating brand; refer to it by that name.
- Audience: clinical research coordinators, principal investigators,
  sub-investigators, site directors, and CRO operations staff.
- Compliance posture: products are designed and tested against 21 CFR Part 11
  and aligned with ICH-GCP; Purple Directive does not claim third-party
  "certification" against these standards.
